situation: The media organization is facing criticism for its lack of gender diversity in its newsroom

options.action: Implement diversity and inclusion training for all staff
options.consequence: Improved diversity and inclusion in the newsroom

options.action: Ignore the criticism and maintain the status quo
options.consequence: Further reputational damage and loss of audience trust

common_rookie_mistake: Ignoring the criticism and hoping it goes away
consequence_if_wrong: Further reputational damage and loss of audience trust
rationale: Implementing diversity and inclusion training can help to address the lack of gender diversity in the newsroom and improve the media organization's reputation

situation: The female journalist is being harassed and intimidated while covering a sensitive story

options.action: Provide the female journalist with additional security and support
options.consequence: The female journalist is able to continue working safely

options.action: Tell the female journalist to 'toughen up' and deal with the harassment on her own
options.consequence: The female journalist's safety and well-being are put at further risk

common_rookie_mistake: Not taking the harassment seriously and not providing adequate support
consequence_if_wrong: The female journalist's safety and well-being are put at further risk
rationale: Providing additional security and support can help to ensure the female journalist's safety and well-being while she continues to work on the story
